title: Upgraded Anvils
description: This upgrades anvils, no more damaged anvils or too expensive.
body:
### 🔨 Upgraded Anvils 
enhances Minecraft’s anvil system with powerful quality-of-life improvements while staying true to the vanilla experience.

### ✨ Features:

- Repair damaged anvils by right-clicking them with an Iron Block instead of crafting a new one
- Use & instead of § for formatting codes directly in anvils
- Removes the annoying “Too Expensive!” limit from anvil operations

Perfect for survival worlds, builders, and long-term progression, Upgraded Anvils makes anvils more practical, less frustrating, and far more enjoyable to use.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72ea6489ec6ca76f8a11749e5610f0bea4dbdafe_0.webp)
